name: Splunk On-Call MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk On-Call app and add-on readiness.
author: splunk-oncall-setup skill

tools.name: oncall_app_health
tools.title: On-Call App Health
tools.description: Check victorops_app and TA-splunk-add-on-for-victorops installation state.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=victorops_app OR title=TA-splunk-add-on-for-victorops OR title=splunk-on-call OR title=*victorops* | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: oncall_required_indexes
tools.title: On-Call Required Indexes
tools.description: Check the VictorOps/On-Call indexes used by the add-on.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=victorops_incidents OR title=victorops_chats OR title=victorops_reports OR title=victorops_webhooks | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: oncall_modular_inputs
tools.title: On-Call Modular Inputs
tools.description: List VictorOps/On-Call modular input families and enabled state.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/inputs/all count=0 | search title=victorops* OR title=*victorops* OR eai:acl.app=TA-splunk-add-on-for-victorops | table title eai:acl.app disabled index sourcetype interval | sort title

tools.name: oncall_recovery_saved_search
tools.title: On-Call Recovery Saved Search
tools.description: Find On-Call recovery or incident restoration saved searches.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/saved/searches count=0 | search eai:acl.app=victorops_app OR title=*VictorOps* OR title=*On-Call* OR title=*recovery* | table title eai:acl.app disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule | sort title

tools.name: oncall_kv_collections
tools.title: On-Call KV Collections
tools.description: List VictorOps/On-Call KV Store collection definitions.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/storage/collections/config count=0 | search eai:acl.app=victorops_app OR eai:acl.app=TA-splunk-add-on-for-victorops OR title=*victorops* | table title eai:acl.app accelerated_fields replicate | sort title

tools.name: oncall_dashboards
tools.title: On-Call Dashboards
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/ui/views count=0 | search eai:acl.app=victorops_app OR title=*victorops* OR title=*oncall* | table title label eai:acl.app isDashboard updated | sort title

tools.name: oncall_recent_data
tools.title: On-Call Recent Indexed Data
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=victorops_incidents OR index=victorops_chats OR index=victorops_reports OR index=victorops_webhooks by index sourcetype host | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count
